name: Blue Cabbage Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. While the cabbage leaves are steaming, mix the remaining ingredients (except cheese) in a saucepan.
2. Stir the mixture with a wire whisk over medium heat until it is very thick. Ensure the mixture is stirred thoroughly.
3. Roll about one tablespoon of the mixture into each cabbage leaf.
4. Place the rolled leaves in a baking dish and cover with grated cheese.
5. Bake for 10 minutes at 300°F.
